warnings.issue: 21 column definition lines exceed 140 chars — inherent to inline ColumnDef pattern
5 useMemo missing dependency warnings — false positives for stable handlers defined in same scope

fixesApplied: Extracted inline getRowClassName to useCallback in Ledger.tsx
Added .ledger-table-amount utility to DataTable.css (fixed broken right-alignment on all migrated pages)
Cleaned dead .ledger-table CSS from Dashboard.css, Operations.css, PettyCash.css

principles.name: Think Before Coding
principles.notes: 6 plans created and sequenced before implementation

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Single generic component replaces 16 manual tables; net -142 lines

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: Only table rendering changed; no unrelated refactors

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: Each plan had verify commands; tsc + build verified at every step

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers
principles.notes: Core intent of the feature — DataTable<T> + @tanstack/react-virtual

principles.name: Don't probe data YOLO-style
principles.notes: TypeScript generics enforce column/row contracts at compile time

principles.name: Validate boundaries
principles.notes: Edge states (empty, loading, error) all handled in DataTable
